channel.title: Comments for page "The Coming Nightmare"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Coming Nightmare"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
There's some pretty bad show don't tell, with this bit near the beginning being one of the more egregious examples:

Prometheus Labs had collapsed not too long ago. Foundation raids, as well as MC&D and GOC interference had crippled the top down structure, leaving a few isolated facilities on their own.

I also feel like having some of the dialogue be inside of paragraphs without breaking them up made the action somewhat hard to follow, and it kind of flits back and forth between prose and hemingway-stlye sparseness. The latter is to its detriment, as the tale comes across strongest when there's some imagery and description to go along with the plot. Overall this is way to uneven for me to do anything but downvote but I think there's potential here if you keep working on it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Dir. Leep Andrews"

Typo or intentional? Assuming you meant Dr.

Could be wrong, though.

Edit: Whoops. You abbreviated director, my bad, ignore this. Admins pls delete.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was originally going to be the second tale in this series, but ultimately after I tabled the first tale, due to issues in taste, and description, I determined that setting the stage for the characters in a different tale would be more efficient.

Many thanks to AbsentmindedNihilist, Weryllium, BitVyper, and anyone else that I may be forgetting who looked over this for me.
